title: cota tinctoria subsp. parnassica
intro: Cota tinctoria subsp. parnassica, also known as the Parnassus or field cinquefoil, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. This perennial herb has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Cota tinctoria subsp. parnassica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health issues.
